queries.name: Students that started this semester
queries.description: This query pulls students whose first semester is equal to the current semester.

columns.name: SARAPPD_APPL_NO
columns.description: This field identifies the application number within the effective term record.

columns.name: SARAPPD_SEQ_NO
columns.description: This field does not display on the form. It identifies the system assigned internal sequence number associated with the application record.

columns.name: SARAPPD_TERM_CODE_ENTRY
columns.description: This field identifies the effective term of the application record.

columns.name: SARAPPD_APDC_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the date application decision was effective.

columns.name: SARAPPD_APDC_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the application decision (APDC) value associated with the application decision.

columns.name: SARAPPD_MAINT_IND
columns.description: This field identifies whether the application decision was maintained by the system or the user.

columns.name: SARAPPD_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the most current date record was created or updated.

columns.name: SARAPPD_USER
columns.description: USER: The ID of the most recent user to create or update a record.

columns.name: SARAPPD_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: DATA SOURCE: Source system that generated the data

columns.name: SARAPPD_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: The user ID of the person who inserted or last updated this record.

columns.name: SARAPPD_DFE_ADMN_DECN_GUID
columns.description: DEPARTMENT FOR EDUCATION ADMISSION DECISION GUID: Global Unique Identifier for Department For Education Admission Decision.
